## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::TreePalm;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        TreePalm { size: 20, stroke: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
vacation, leisure, island

## Categories
nature, sustainability

[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/tree-palm)
